title: About
text: HI! I’m Gavyn, a student at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln. I love the sports data that most don’t talk about and I love to share it!

title: Who is Punter University?
text:
Code
library(tidyverse)


Touchdowns, field goals, touchdowns, fumbles, points, points, points!! The most important thing in football is scoring touchdowns and having an explosive offense. Or is it?
A very undervalued and overlooked upperhand to have : a good punter.
